response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially matches. The Reference JSON incorrectly identified the segment from 00:35 to 01:00 as 'Caramel Pain', whereas it was actually a duet of 'Orpheus' with Nerissa Ravencroft. 'Caramel Pain' correctly begins at 01:24. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for 'Caramel Pain' while performing manual transcription for the intro, 'Orpheus' segment, and the outro discussion. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal activation. Applied aggressive truncation for rapid song transitions and included subtitles for prominent on-screen text (band member credits and song titles).

subtitles.original: Here we go!
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: First up on the drums we got Genta!
subtitles.english: First up on the drums we got Genta!

subtitles.original: [Drums: 白川 玄太]
subtitles.english: [Drums: Genta Shirakawa]

subtitles.original: Then on the bass it's Yu Park!
subtitles.english: Then on the bass it's Yu Park!

subtitles.original: [Bass: Yu Park]
subtitles.english: [Bass: Yu Park]

subtitles.original: And on the guitar is Yoshi!
subtitles.english: And on the guitar is Yoshi!

subtitles.original: [Guitar: 芳賀 義彦]
subtitles.english: [Guitar: Yoshihiko Haga]

subtitles.original: And last but not least, tonight's manipulator is Hana!
subtitles.english: And last but not least, tonight's manipulator is Hana!

subtitles.original:
All right Nerissa, let's take 'em out!
Sounds good? Here we go!
subtitles.english:
All right Nerissa, let's take 'em out!
Sounds good? Here we go!

subtitles.original:
Orpheus, get me go and taking space
with the bass and drum
subtitles.english:
Orpheus, get me go and taking space
with the bass and drum

subtitles.original:
So let's blow this joint and if the feelings fight
then we can make a little music of our own tonight.
subtitles.english:
So let's blow this joint and if the feelings fight
then we can make a little music of our own tonight.

subtitles.original:
Orpheus, get me go and taking space
with the bass and drum
subtitles.english:
Orpheus, get me go and taking space
with the bass and drum

subtitles.original:
Why you walking away? I got a lot to say.
Guess I'll save it up for the next one. Whoo!
subtitles.english:
Why you walking away? I got a lot to say.
Guess I'll save it up for the next one. Whoo!

subtitles.original:
I ain't tryna stress you, I must confess though,
my heart's been turned to ice.
subtitles.english:
I ain't tryna stress you, I must confess though,
my heart's been turned to ice.

subtitles.original:
Oh yeah, so hear me out Orpheus, I'm thinking
next time I'll show you what I really wanna do.
subtitles.english:
Oh yeah, so hear me out Orpheus, I'm thinking
next time I'll show you what I really wanna do.

subtitles.original: Bye Nerissa! Thanks for singing with me!
subtitles.english: Bye Nerissa! Thanks for singing with me!

subtitles.original: Have a good rest of your birthday! Love you!
subtitles.english: Have a good rest of your birthday! Love you!

subtitles.original: Yes! See you later, love you too, bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Yes! See you later, love you too, bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ねえあたしいつも勇気が足りないから
subtitles.english: Hey, I'm always lacking courage,

subtitles.original: 自分を大切にできないんだ
subtitles.english: so I can't cherish myself.

subtitles.original: 痛い目をみないと気付けやしないんだ
subtitles.english: I won't notice unless I have a painful experience.

subtitles.original: あーあ今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.

subtitles.original: [曲：キャラメルペイン / 作詞・作曲：DECO*27]
subtitles.english: [Song: Caramel Pain / Lyrics, Music: DECO*27]

subtitles.original: 良い子でなんかいられないよ
subtitles.english: I can't just be a good girl,

subtitles.original: だって世界はこんなにも極彩色で
subtitles.english: because the world is so colorful,

subtitles.original: 甘ったるくて苦いし あ、待って頭痛いし
subtitles.english: cloyingly sweet and bitter. Ah, wait, my head hurts...

subtitles.original: ヘトヘトで漂うだけの24/7
subtitles.english: and I'm just drifting, 24/7.

subtitles.original: ギリギリ感情おさえるなんてもう無理
subtitles.english: It's impossible to suppress my barely-held emotions.

subtitles.original: このままではいられないの日々
subtitles.english: These days, I can't stay like this.

subtitles.original: ちょっとこわいけど...
subtitles.english: It's a little scary, but...

subtitles.original: 置いてくよ置いてくよ置いてくよ
subtitles.english: I'll leave them behind, leave them behind.

subtitles.original: 今まで手にしたイデオロギーもスタイルも
subtitles.english: Even the ideologies and styles I held until now...

subtitles.original: 壊れちゃっても今がいいよ
subtitles.english: even if they break, right now is fine,

subtitles.original: だってあたしはあたしのままでずっといたいんだもん
subtitles.english: because I want to stay as I am forever.

subtitles.original: ルート? ムード? どうでもいーよトゥーザネクスト
subtitles.english: Route? Mood? Who cares? To the next,

subtitles.original: もっと危ないことしたら勝ちなんでしょ
subtitles.english: if I do more dangerous things, I win, right?

subtitles.original: 何を犠牲にしたってしょうがないんだよ
subtitles.english: Whatever I have to sacrifice, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: フロムマイベッド この胸の痛みだけ抱いて
subtitles.english: From my bed, just hugging the pain in this chest.

subtitles.original: あーあ今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.

subtitles.original: ミルフィーユみたいにはぐらかしたって
subtitles.english: Even if I dodge it like a mille-feuille,

subtitles.original: いつかバレちゃうよ 腐っちゃうよ
subtitles.english: it'll be exposed someday. It'll rot, it'll rot.

subtitles.original: 痛いとか素直に君に言えてれば
subtitles.english: If I could have honestly told you it was painful,

subtitles.original: 今頃何か変わってたのかもね
subtitles.english: maybe something would have changed by now.

subtitles.original: 好きなアニメもなくなっちゃうし
subtitles.english: The anime I like will disappear,

subtitles.original: 好きな人だっていなくなっちゃうんだ
subtitles.english: and the person I like will disappear too.

subtitles.original: 寂しくなっちゃうな
subtitles.english: That makes me lonely.

subtitles.original: 大切なことは ただ一つだけさ
subtitles.english: The important thing is just one thing.

subtitles.original: もう後悔しないように前を向いて生きるということ!
subtitles.english: So I don't have any more regrets, I'll live looking forward!

subtitles.original: 置いてくよ置いてくよ置いてくよ
subtitles.english: I'll leave them behind, leave them behind.

subtitles.original: 今まで手にしたイデオロギーもスタイルも
subtitles.english: Even the ideologies and styles I held until now...

subtitles.original: 汚れちゃっても気にしないよ
subtitles.english: even if they get dirty, I don't care,

subtitles.original: だってあたしはあたしに恋してたいんだもん
subtitles.english: because I want to be in love with myself.

subtitles.original: 愛してるよ愛してるよ愛してるよ
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you, I love you.

subtitles.original: さよならなんて涙が出ちゃうけど
subtitles.english: Saying goodbye makes me tear up, but...

subtitles.original: 何を犠牲にしたってしょうがないんだよ
subtitles.english: whatever I have to sacrifice, it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: フロムマイベッド この胸の痛みだけ抱いて
subtitles.english: From my bed, just hugging the pain in this chest.

subtitles.original: あーあ今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.

subtitles.original: ねえあたしいつも勇気が足りないから
subtitles.english: Hey, I'm always lacking courage,

subtitles.original: 自分を大切にできないんだ
subtitles.english: so I can't cherish myself.

subtitles.original: 痛いくらいなら少し我慢するんだ
subtitles.english: If it hurts, I'll just endure it a little.

subtitles.original: あーあ今日もキャラメルペインです
subtitles.english: Ah, ah, it's Caramel Pain again today.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！すいせい先輩きた！
subtitles.english: Yay! Suisei-sempai came!

subtitles.original: やったー！最高！やったー！
subtitles.english: Yeah! The best! We did it!

subtitles.original: 久しぶりですけど、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: It's been a while, but congrats!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介お願いします。
subtitles.english: Self-introduction please.

subtitles.original:
彗星の如く現れたスターの原石、
アイドルVTuberの星街すいせいです！
subtitles.english:
I'm the diamond in the rough,
the idol VTuber Hoshimachi Suisei!

subtitles.original: カリオペ、誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Calliope, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！誕生日です！
subtitles.english: Thank you! It's my birthday!

subtitles.original: そしてね、メジャーデビューも4周年！
subtitles.english: And also, it's the 4th anniversary of your major debut!

subtitles.original: そうですよ、長い！おめでとう！
subtitles.english: That's right! Wow, it's been a long time, congrats!

subtitles.original: 一緒に歌いましたよ。
subtitles.english: We sang together!

subtitles.original: そう、4年前ね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, 4 years ago!
